MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ANTHONY JACKSON, MD'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate.
APPEARANCE: M. Cris Armenta, Esq. of The Armenta Law Firm 310/917-1026 for petitioner & moving party; Heidi R. Weisbaum, Deputy Atty General 619/645-2098 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court took the matter under submission. Proposed orders submitted by each side. (301/JLW/CK) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

M. Cris Armenta, Esq., 310-917-1026 for petitioner and moving party Anthony Jackson, M.D.

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT A R G U E D and the Court MODIFIED its tentative ruling as follows --
